One front door for every proof path

Everything important,
easy to find
and safe to run.

The Ascension site now has a complete map: guided routes for first-time visitors, executives, builders, operators, reviewers, and legal/risk readers. Every demo remains browser-local and public-safe.

Explore the Atlas ↓

Public-safe boundary: no account, no wallet connection, no transaction, no analytics, no cookies, no browser storage, and no user data wanted. Do not enter personal, confidential, customer, regulated, wallet, seed phrase, or private-key information.
